name: Station at Savannah Quarters
utility_structure: Georgia Power provides electricity; unit-level water submetered; whole-building data available from Georgia Power
notes: All-electric confirmed from ESG DD report (March 2023). Georgia Power cooperates with whole-building data sharing — no Conservice manual meter program needed. Propane serves outdoor grill/fireplace amenities only (non-material). Flood risk flagged RED in ESG DD (FEMA). iApts tech package replacement recommended. Georgia is a regulated electricity market — no PPA opportunity.
flood_risk: Red flag — review FEMA flood map before PSA
